title: Hawaii Disability Claims Specialist Rates (BU13 salary schedule, eff 2025-07-01)
description: Hawaii DDS examiner series — Disability Claims Specialist II (class 3.386, SR-18, $55,080-$78,420) and III (3.387, SR-20, $59,532-$84,828) — with SR assignments verified from official HI state job postings and annual figures from the official DHRD Bargaining Unit 13 salary schedule (eff 2025-07-01). The working-supervisor DCS IV (3.388) is recorded with a candidate SR-22 mapping ($64,428-$91,728) flagged unverified. Administering agency is HI DHS Disability Determination Branch (within DVR). HGEA Unit 13 (Professional and Scientific).

columns.name: classes.<class>.salary_range_code
columns.description: HI Salary Range (SR) code; verified for DCS II/III, candidate for DCS IV.

columns.name: classes.<class>.annual_min
columns.description: Annual minimum (Step D) for the SR on the BU13 schedule.

columns.name: classes.<class>.annual_max
columns.description: Annual maximum (Step M) for the SR on the BU13 schedule.

source.publisher: Hawaii Department of Human Resources Development (DHRD) / HGEA; HI Dept of Human Services (DHS) Disability Determination Branch
source.title: DHRD Bargaining Unit 13 Salary Schedule, effective 07/01/2025 + Disability Claims Specialist class spec/postings

update_cadence: biennial HGEA cycle / annual BU13 schedule
notes: Authoritative for the examiner classes: Disability Claims Specialist II (SR-18) and III (SR-20) — SR assignments verified from official HI state job postings (DCS II posting confirms 'DVR Disability Determination Branch', SR-18) and annual min(Step D)/max(Step M) from the official DHRD BU13 salary schedule eff 2025-07-01. The working-supervisor DCS IV (class spec 3.388) is recorded with a CANDIDATE SR-22 mapping (schedule values shown, grade UNVERIFIED — supervisor_sr_verified false). Hiring-range caveat: HI postings quote a hiring sub-range (e.g. DCS II 'Steps C to I'); the full salary range uses the official schedule's Step D-M. Corrections: examiner class is Disability Claims Specialist (not generic 'Disability Determination Examiner'). HGEA Unit 13 (Professional and Scientific); successor-CBA wage terms not separately verified.
